bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid across all issues. The opponent opened with all valueC, which is the lowest-utility valid offer for me and gives no evidence yet of meaningful concession, so I will counter firmly with my preferred values.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid around 0.96 because it is still the opening phase at t=0.02, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has only conceded slightly by moving issueA from valueC to valueB while keeping all other issues at valueC, which is still low utility for me, and there are no messages to alter that assessment. To avoid simply repeating my prior maximum bid, I concede only on a low-weight issue.

I am targeting a high-utility bid of about 0.92 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is little need for major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have improved for me from all valueC to conceding issueA to valueA and issueB to valueB, so they appear to be moving toward my preferences. I will hold firm on the highest-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding only the low-weight issueF further than my last offer.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.88 because it is still very early at t=0.06, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has clearly conceded on issueA and issueB over time, but is holding firm at valueC on issueC through issueF, so I will hold my high-weight issues A/B/C while conceding somewhat on lower-weight issues E/F and avoid repeating my exact previous bid.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.84 because it is still very early (t=0.08), so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have steadily improved for me, especially on issueA, issueB, and issueE, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues while conceding slightly on lower-weight issueD and keeping prior concessions on issueE/issueF.

I am targeting a high but slightly more conciliatory utility around 0.801, since it is still early at t=0.10 but the opponent has clearly conceded on issueA and issueB while holding issueC and issueF low for me. Their latest offer is worth about 0.641 to me, so I will keep my high-weight issueC at valueA while conceding on lower-weight issueE and issueF and matching their current issueD concession. There are no opponent messages to adjust for, so I rely only on the offer pattern.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76 because it is early in the negotiation, so I should not concede on the high-weight issues A, B, and C yet. The opponent has improved substantially from their opening and has repeatedly offered valueA on issueA and sometimes issueB, while still pushing valueC/valueB on lower issues, so I concede mainly on low-weight D/E/F. There are no opponent messages to weigh, so I am relying only on the offer pattern.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.68 while avoiding a repeat of my last bid and preserving my highest-weight issueA and important issueB at valueA. At t=0.14 it is still early, but the opponent has shown willingness to give issueA and sometimes issueB while pushing hard on lower/other issues, so I concede issueC to valueB and leave low-weight issues D/E/F at valueC.

I am targeting a utility around 0.68 by keeping my high-weight issueB at valueA while already conceding heavily on the lower-weight issues D/E/F. The opponent has been conceding substantially toward my preferences, especially on issueA and issueC, and since time is still early at t=0.16 there is no need to accept their latest lower-utility offer yet.

I am still targeting a high-utility bid around 0.72 because the negotiation is early at t=0.18, so there is no need to make a major concession yet. The opponent has improved substantially from all valueC offers and has signaled willingness to give valueA on issueB and valueB on issueC, while occasionally offering valueB on issueD; I will hold firm on high-weight issueA and issueB while varying a lower-weight issue to avoid repeating my last bid.

I am targeting a utility around 0.72, since it is still early at t=0.20 but the opponent’s offers have improved substantially, with their latest bid worth about 0.682 to me. I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues A and B, keep their signaled concession on issueC at valueB, and vary my low-weight concessions to avoid repeating my last bid exactly.

I am targeting about 0.72 utility, still fairly strong because the negotiation is only at t=0.22 and there is no need to drop to the opponent’s current 0.64-level offer yet. The opponent has conceded on high-importance issueA and issueB but continues pushing issueC down, so I am holding issueC at valueB while varying concessions on lower-weight issues to avoid simply repeating my last bid.

At t=0.24, there is still time, but the opponent has already signaled willingness to give me high value on issueA and sometimes issueB while resisting on lower-weight issues. I am targeting a solid utility around 0.66 by holding issueA and issueB at my top values, keeping issueC at valueB, and conceding the low-weight issues D/E/F to valueC; this also matches a bid the opponent previously offered, improving acceptance chances.
